query:
ALTER TABLE `project_items` 
  CHANGE COLUMN `technology` `technique` enum('3d_print','cnc','painting','cad_work','model_making','assembly','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  CHANGE COLUMN `ek_price` `unit_ek` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  CHANGE COLUMN `vk_price` `unit_vk` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_ek` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_vk` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sort_order` int DEFAULT 0,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `supplier_id`;

ALTER TABLE `project_items` 
  CHANGE COLUMN `technology` `technique` enum('3d_print','cnc','painting','cad_work','model_making','assembly','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  CHANGE COLUMN `ek_price` `unit_ek` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  CHANGE COLUMN `vk_price` `unit_vk` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_ek` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `total_vk` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sort_order` int DEFAULT 0,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `supplier_id`;
